conflict_or_gap: Freshness is high priority in one row but stale signaling is medium in another for same failure mode
normalization_rule: If stale or missing threat intel can influence release or update decisions classify as high and block privileged workflows by default

conflict_or_gap: Warn-and-continue completion semantics conflict with recommendations to block on stale or offline intelligence
normalization_rule: Allow warnings only for read-only reporting modes and require fail-closed behavior on write merge or release paths

conflict_or_gap: Framework references exist without runtime verification so assurance claims can mislead
normalization_rule: Require every declared control to map to at least one executable gate with pass-fail evidence

conflict_or_gap: Offline and no-NVD mode can still report success and create false confidence
normalization_rule: Mandate degraded-state labeling with explicit TTL exception token and partial-assurance status in outputs

conflict_or_gap: Exact-column schema can block legitimate safety operations and incentivize bypass
normalization_rule: Use strict required subset validation with schema versioning and compatibility checks

conflict_or_gap: Non-interactive broad-write automation conflicts with scoped approvals and policy review
normalization_rule: Default to dry-run or read-only and require signed intent for cross-repo or destructive writes

conflict_or_gap: Regex-only detection leaves transformed or novel secrets undetected
normalization_rule: Adopt layered detection baseline with quarantine on high-confidence hits and managed false-positive budgets

conflict_or_gap: Capped enrichment can truncate severity context while thresholds drive action
normalization_rule: Disallow threshold-based action on incomplete datasets unless confidence metadata is explicit

conflict_or_gap: Recommendations lack strict ordering and can produce unstable decisions
normalization_rule: Enforce sequence data quality gates then calibrated thresholds then automation actions
